description_long: This is an ornate ring featuring a large, rounded, pale gemstone set in a robust, sculpted metal band. The band is intricately designed with organic, almost skeletal motifs that wrap around the finger, giving the piece a dramatic and vintage appearance. The gemstone is cabochon-cut, smooth, and slightly domed, held securely by a thick bezel setting. The metal appears to be a warm, coppery alloy, with detailed texturing and subtle patina that enhances its antique look. The sides of the ring showcase elaborate, intertwining forms that add depth and visual interest. Overall, the ring exudes a sense of craftsmanship and bold, artistic flair.
description: An ornate copper-toned ring with a large, domed pale gemstone and intricate, organic sculpted band details. The design is vintage and dramatic, with elaborate motifs and a prominent central stone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large domed gemstone and the symmetrical, sculpted band details flanking the stone.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick bezel setting and the intricate, intertwining motifs on the band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous band and the organic, skeletal-like design elements wrapping around the finger.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the elaborate side motifs and the smooth, rounded surface of the gemstone.
